landing.heroDescription: Hacelo Corto brings the full workflow into one web app: upload your video, generate clips with content profiles, edit in timeline, mix audio, manage your library and export results.

auth.accessItem1: Panel to monitor job status in real time.
auth.accessItem2: Processed clips history with direct download.
auth.accessItem3: Base ready to integrate real API authentication.
auth.onboardingItem1: Configure profile and output preferences by social network.
auth.onboardingItem2: Connect your upload and automated processing flow.
auth.onboardingItem3: Scale from tests to production without changing the base UI.
auth.googleStartError: We could not start Google sign-in.
auth.oauthMissingData: We did not receive the required data from Google.
auth.oauthInvalidState: We could not validate callback security (invalid state).
auth.oauthCompleteError: We could not complete Google authentication.
